citations.quote: complete the RA Application Pack and email it to Reslife@napier.ac.uk by 5pm 12 April 2026. You can also find the RA Application Pack attached to this email for easy access.

findings.text: NAP-SRC-0046 email includes an attachment named '2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx' (63 KB).
The email states the RA Application Pack is attached and directs applicants to email completed packs to Reslife@napier.ac.uk by 5pm 12 April 2026.
The extracted text confirms the attachment exists but does not contain the attachment content itself. The attachment binary is not available in the source_materials.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## RA Application Pack Attachment Extraction

**Source:** NAP-SRC-0046 - RA Applications are now open! - RA Recruitment.pdf

**Attachment Identified:**
- Filename: `2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx`
- Size: 63 KB

**Status:** The email body confirms the attachment exists and provides instructions for applicants. However, the attachment content (the .docx file) is not included in the extracted text or source materials provided for this task. The extracted text only captures the email body, not the binary attachment.

**Recommendation:** To obtain the actual content of the RA Application Pack, the .docx file must be extracted from the original PDF source (NAP-SRC-0046) using a tool capable of handling embedded attachments (e.g., pdfdetach, manual extraction, or a document processing tool).
proposed_artifacts.title: RA Application Pack Attachment Extraction Result

proposed_tasks.instructions: Extract the embedded attachment '2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx' from the PDF source NAP-SRC-0046. Use a tool such as pdfdetach or a Python script with PyPDF2/pdfplumber to extract the binary attachment. Save the extracted .docx file as a new source artifact and then extract its text content for review.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract embedded .docx attachment from NAP-SRC-0046 PDF

risk_flags.description: The attachment content is not available in the provided source_materials; the extraction is incomplete without the .docx file.

summary: Extracted email metadata from NAP-SRC-0046 confirms an attached file '2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx' (63 KB). The email body directs applicants to complete and submit the pack by 12 April 2026. The attachment content itself is not present in the extracted text; a follow-up task is proposed to extract the embedded .docx from the PDF.

uncertainties.description: The actual content of the RA Application Pack (.docx) is not available in the source_materials; only the email body text was extracted.
